div1.entryFree:
Supportance, 1) that which keeps from falling or sinking, support, prop: give some s. to the bending twigs, R2 III, 4, 32.
2) that which keeps up and preserves from failing; an upholding: he will fight with you for's oath sake; . . . therefore draw, for the s. of his vow, Tw. III, 4, 329.
